description: Upgrade all of your citizen archers to Advanced rank.
requirementsTooltip: Unlocked in City Phase. Requires “Archery Tradition.”
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]Basic Archer Infantry auto-promote to Advanced Rank:
• Archer Infantry +20% projectile range and vision range.
• Archer Infantry +10% health and projectile accuracy.
• Archer Infantry +10% train time and +5 food and wood costs.
• Unlocks “Elite Foot Archery.”[/font]
